reason: Successfully verified that the QA-20260421-164036-dfch agent can use the GitHub tool to authenticate and retrieve the logged-in user's GitHub username.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260421-164036-dfch" agent in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened, showing "idle" status.
Verified agent status is "idle" - Confirmed status indicator shows "idle" in the top right and alongside agent name.
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message text populated in the input field.
Clicked "Send message" button - Message was sent successfully, agent status changed to "working", and new session "GitHub Username Verification Request" was created.

Waited for GitHub account access request card - Card appeared after ~5 seconds asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up the authenticated username?" with a pre-connected GitHub account checkbox selected.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button - Request was submitted, agent status changed back to "working".
Handled GitHub API request permission dialog - "Allow Once" button clicked to permit the GET /user API call.
Waited for agent response - Agent completed processing in ~49 seconds, returned to "idle" status.
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly states: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." (shown in bold in the chat).
Took final screenshot - Screenshot successfully captured showing the complete conversation with user message, tool calls, and GitHub username response.
